title: Classic Lasagna
description: A classic Italian dish featuring layers of lasagna noodles, rich meat sauce, and a blend of cheeses.
instructions: Cook lasagna noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add marinara sauce to the skillet and stir to combine. Bring to a simmer and let cook for 5 minutes.
In a large bowl, combine ricotta cheese, mozzarella cheese, and parmesan cheese. Mix well to combine.
Spread a layer of marinara sauce in the bottom of a 9x13-inch baking dish.
Arrange 4 lasagna noodles on top of the sauce.
Spread half of the ricotta cheese mixture over the noodles.
Sprinkle with half of the shredded mozzarella cheese.
Repeat the layers, starting with the noodles, then the marinara sauce, then the ricotta cheese mixture, and finally the remaining mozzarella cheese.
Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Let the lasagna rest for 10-15 minutes before slicing and serving.
